ever since he saw you–years ago–he'd been completely obsessed, knowing he had to have you no matter what. it wasn't difficult to get into the palace with his good looks, and it was exhilarating that he could see you in person after so long, especially since you personally chose him to be one of your concubines.

when he was passing through your room(aka lurking outside, as he always did) he could smell pheromones, *omega pheromones.*
